divisions.name: Garments
divisions.description: Premium knit and woven apparel manufacturing.
divisions.longDescription: Our garment division is the heart of Pondit Group's operations. Incorporated in 2008, we have established a state-of-the-art facility that integrates every stage of garment manufacturing. From cutting and sewing to finishing and packing, our lines are optimized for efficiency, quality, and worker safety.

divisions.name: Knitting
divisions.longDescription: Our knitting division utilizes the latest machinery and modern equipment in our production process for maximum quality output. We specialize in a wide range of knit structures, providing the foundation for premium apparel brands globally.

divisions.name: Printing
divisions.description: Advanced screen and digital printing solutions.
divisions.longDescription: Raisa Printing & Packaging Ltd offers comprehensive printing services including high-density, puff, foil, and discharge prints. Our facility is equipped with MHM automatic carousels for precision and consistency.

ceo.name: Mr. Rafiqul Islam
ceo.title: Chief Executive Officer
ceo.intro: At EUROASIA, our journey began with a simple but powerful belief — that Bangladesh's garment industry can lead the world not just in volume, but in quality and integrity. Over two decades, we have built a company that stands on three pillars: skilled people, responsible production, and relentless innovation.
content: Every garment that leaves our factory carries our reputation. We invest deeply in our workforce — training, welfare, and safety — because we know that great products come from great people. Our social compliance standards exceed what buyers ask for, because it's the right thing to do.

To our valued buyers and partners around the world: we are not just a supplier. We are your manufacturing partner, committed to your success as much as our own. Our doors, lines, and hearts are open to building long-term relationships grounded in trust, transparency, and excellence.

md.name: Ms. Nusrat Jahan
md.title: Managing Director
md.intro: Leading EUROASIA as Managing Director has been a privilege and an honour. My focus has always been on operational excellence — ensuring that every order, regardless of size, receives the same meticulous attention, rigor of quality control, and speed of delivery that our clients have come to expect.
content: In today's competitive global market, buyers have more choices than ever. What sets us apart is not just our capacity or our certifications — it's our culture. A culture where problems are solved proactively, communication is honest, and deadlines are sacred.

I am particularly proud of our sustainability journey. We have reduced water consumption by 35%, transitioned to renewable energy for 40% of our operations, and achieved zero-discharge status in our dyeing unit. These are not just numbers — they represent our commitment to the planet.
